_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation - 2026-July RayDPT-validation phase (FRESH RESET). The June improvement phase (champion 2.030) is archived on branch 2026-June-RayDPT-improvement. This phase restarts from the ORIGINAL RayDPT baseline (commit f677b0f, 5ch, fp32-era) with a CORRECTED loss (the coarse-layout & low-pass loss TARGETS now use MASK-WEIGHTED pooling; the old avg-pool/blur included invalid gt=0 pixels and corrupted the target). Goal: re-run/validate the research with the fixed loss. Same framework (program.md v2, research.py, hypothesis-driven workflow).
global_champion_note: None yet - first run (E0) establishes the fresh baseline with the fixed loss.
metric_note: compute_errors (abs_rel/rmse/d1) in prepare.py is the FIXED eval metric (unchanged). The honest composite ranking = rmse/1.6 + (1-d1)/0.46 + 0.3*abs_rel/0.4 (RMSE+d1 dominate; abs_rel discounted). The 2026-July FIX is to the LOSS (coarse/low targets), not to compute_errors.

active_study.general_hypothesis: Establish the fresh baseline: the original RayDPT (5ch [logL,logR,ILD,cosIPD,sinIPD] + flip-aug) with the CORRECTED coarse/low-pass loss targets (mask-weighted pooling), to anchor the 2026-July validation phase.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Run the reset baseline train.py (f677b0f + loss fix) unchanged; record its metrics as the new baseline. Then the workflow proceeds - re-validating whether the June findings (bf16/bs32/lr, coarse/geometry attention, gated skips, multi-res STFT, coherence, TTA) still hold under the corrected loss.
active_study.experiment_note: E0: baseline run, python train.py --mode train (defaults: in_ch=5, flip_aug, no FEATURE_FN, no TTA).
active_study.decision_rule: Record the baseline metrics. Then follow program.md's hypothesis-driven workflow. KEY: re-verify the June findings under the FIXED loss - the corrected coarse/low targets may change which cues/architectures help. Never crown on <2-3 draws (E121/E125 lesson from the June phase).

backlog.idea: Re-validate the June optimisation envelope under the fixed loss: bf16 AMP + bs32 + lr4e-4 + warmup-cosine + EMA0.995 (June: big early win).

Re-validate the June representation wins under the fixed loss: multi-res STFT (fine-time echo delay) and interaural coherence (direct-vs-diffuse). The coarse/low-target fix especially affects the coarse-layout loss which the geometry/coarse studies leaned on.
The June E116 dropped the vestigial pix2pix encoder tail (24.44M->7.69M, provably equivalent) - re-apply early once the baseline is confirmed.
